benchmark_protocol.source_generation: Separate process; every warm-up and measured run reused one deterministic source workbook per profile.
profiles: numeric schema-v10/matrix-v4: 2 warm-up plus 5 measured runs
mixed-inline schema-v10/matrix-v4: 2 warm-up plus 5 measured runs
formula plus external hyperlink schema-v10/matrix-v4: 1 warm-up plus 3 measured runs
benchmark_protocol.representative_policy: Measured run nearest total_editor_ms median; earliest run breaks ties.
benchmark_protocol.verification: Every run passed output-plan byte accounting and planned raw compressed-payload equality; representative outputs were checked with openpyxl after benchmark timing.

validation.focused_tests: 7/7 passed: worksheet event reader, worksheet transformer and five PackageEditor C5 shards

qualification: Elapsed time is system-sensitive. Claims are limited to the recorded same-machine warmed protocol and are not generalized to arbitrary workbooks, other machines, Office compatibility or full-feature superiority.
